_comment: Insta360 - targeting the Antigravity drone (invisible-rig 360 aerial capture). FFM facts live in data/global.json.
name: Insta360

meta.title: Focus Finder Media - Insta360 Sponsorship Deck
meta.description: A scroll-driven look at the Insta360 x Focus Finder Media partnership.

challenge.label: The Challenge
challenge.heading:
Aerial footage always
shows its hand.

nodes.d: Drone shadows, props, and gimbal arms breaking the shot
One framing, one direction, decided before the shot is captured
Canyons, tree cover, and tight terrain where standard drones can't fly
No way to reframe after the moment is gone
The same drone shots, again and again

challenge.quote: "Every drone shot we capture is locked the moment we capture it. One angle, one direction, and if it's wrong, the moment is gone. An aerial camera that captures everything and lets us choose the angle later is a completely different way to shoot."

solution.label: The Solution
solution.heading:
Antigravity turns the sky
into raw material.
solution.sub: Insta360's Antigravity drone shoots full 360 from the air, an invisible rig that disappears from the frame and leaves every angle reframeable in post. For an expedition built around landscapes too big for a single framing, that's not a feature, it's a new way to cover terrain.

spokes.s: No props, arms, or shadows in the shot
Every angle captured, the edit decides the shot
Flies where standard drone framing can't
Aerial coverage our audience hasn't seen from us

solution.line2: Antigravity doesn't just add another drone to the kit. It changes what an aerial shot even is, every direction captured, every angle still available when we sit down to edit.

partnership.heading: New gear earns attention when it changes the footage.
paragraphs: Our audience has seen plenty of drone shots. What they haven't seen is 360 aerial capture used the way Antigravity makes possible: an invisible rig, full coverage, and reframing that opens up angles a standard drone could never deliver in a single pass.

The plan is straightforward: Antigravity in the field on our next expedition, with creator-led BTS showing how 360 aerial capture works, organic posts built around the reframed footage, and long-form work that puts the format front and center.

flow.s: Primary aerial camera for the expedition
Shared live, and built into films

finalAsk.heading:
The sky has more angles
than one drone shot.
Let's capture all of them.
finalAsk.paragraph: Focus Finder Media exists to find the angle no one's seen yet. Antigravity makes that angle, all of them, capturable in a single flight. Let's put it in the air on the next expedition.
